name: Bread
plain_language_meaning: Food / Nourishment — I am hungry. I ask for bread. Not begging. Survival with dignity.
context: Friedmandostorp bread stop / early Nago market sign.
screen_reader_label: Nago sign: Bread. Meaning: I am hungry, I ask for bread.
no_color_only_note: Shape (arch + three strokes) carries the meaning; no color dependency.
low_vision_support: High-contrast raised arch silhouette, legible at a distance and by touch.
provenance_care_note: Foundational sign; locked to the realized plate (PLATE_NAGO_SYMBOLOGY_OF_UMADA.png).
alt_text: A raised arch shape with three vertical ridges, the Nago sign for Bread.

name: Water
visual_mark: Wave line or descending double mark.
tactile_form: Raised wave with two descending ridges.
screen_reader_label: Nago sign: Water. Meaning: need water.
no_color_only_note: Do not rely on blue color; wave-line shape carries the meaning.
low_vision_support: Raised wave form distinguishable by touch and silhouette.
provenance_care_note: Core survival sign locked to the realized plate.
alt_text: A raised wave-line shape with two descending ridges, the Nago sign for Water.

name: Safe
plain_language_meaning: Safe / Protection — no threat, I mean no harm.
tactile_form: Raised open circle with calm base line.
screen_reader_label: Nago sign: Safe. Meaning: no threat, I mean no harm.
no_color_only_note: Open-circle-plus-line shape carries the meaning, not color.
low_vision_support: Should be distinguishable by touch from Home; calm base line is a tactile differentiator.
provenance_care_note: Core survival sign locked to the realized plate.
alt_text: A raised open circle above a calm settling base line, the Nago sign for Safe.
open_questions: Confirm tactile distinction from Home is sufficient once both are rendered at production scale.

name: Danger
plain_language_meaning: Danger / Warning — threat there, be alert.
visual_mark: Triangle or broken circle with sharp line; the realized plate reads as a sharp crossed (X) form.
context: Q scout logic / rescue route warning.
screen_reader_label: Nago sign: Danger. Meaning: threat there, be alert.
no_color_only_note: Use shape (sharp angles), not color-only warning (e.g. not red alone).
low_vision_support: Sharp, high-contrast angular relief for fast tactile and visual recognition.
provenance_care_note: Core survival sign locked to the realized plate.
alt_text: A raised sharp-angled crossed mark, the Nago sign for Danger.
open_questions: Exact construction (triangle vs. crossed/X form) needs a vector-level pass against the plate.

name: Carry
plain_language_meaning: Carry / Support — help me carry, help carry.
tactile_form: Raised supportive arc with dot above.
screen_reader_label: Nago sign: Carry. Meaning: help me carry.
no_color_only_note: Arc-and-dot shape carries the meaning, not color.
low_vision_support: Must distinguish carry-person from carry-object at touch scale.
provenance_care_note: Core survival sign locked to the realized plate.
alt_text: A raised supportive arc beneath a dot, the Nago sign for Carry.
open_questions: Carry-person vs. carry-object distinction not yet separately specified.

name: Home
plain_language_meaning: Home / Belonging — go home, take me home.
gesture: Hand to chest, hand outward, return.
tactile_form: Raised doorway shape with inward line.
screen_reader_label: Nago sign: Home. Meaning: go home, take me home.
no_color_only_note: Threshold-and-line shape carries the meaning, not color.
low_vision_support: Works as a map icon and a tactile sign at consistent scale.
provenance_care_note: Core survival sign locked to the realized plate.
alt_text: A raised doorway shape with an inward-pointing line, the Nago sign for Home.

name: Help
plain_language_meaning: Help / Assistance — help needed, or help here.
screen_reader_label: Nago sign: Help. Meaning: help needed, or help here.
no_color_only_note: Paired hand shape carries the meaning, not color.
low_vision_support: Works at distance and by touch; plain-language label required alongside.
provenance_care_note: Added to the core survival set per the realized plate (ship-notes correction).
alt_text: Two raised open hands, the Nago sign for Help.

name: Rest
context: Rest points on rescue and access routes.
screen_reader_label: Nago sign: Rest. Meaning: rest here, recover.
no_color_only_note: Cupped-arc shape carries the meaning, not color.
low_vision_support: Distinguish from Safe by touch; pair with rest-point wayfinding.
provenance_care_note: Added to the core survival set per the realized plate (ship-notes correction).
alt_text: A raised shallow cupped arc, the Nago sign for Rest.

name: Witness
plain_language_meaning: I saw. Record this. Do not erase.
visual_mark: Hand + Ring (per the plate's Visual Grammar).
screen_reader_label: Nago sign: Witness. Meaning: I saw, record this, do not erase.
no_color_only_note: Hand-plus-ring shape carries the meaning, not color.
low_vision_support: Plain-language label required; distinct silhouette from Memory's plain Circle primitive.
provenance_care_note: Canonical Nago sign, not part of the core-survival eight. Belongs to the Memory family (renamed from a prior 'Witness' family).
alt_text: A raised hand shape enclosing a ring, the Nago sign for Witness.

name: Relay
plain_language_meaning: Pass this message. Continue the chain.
visual_mark: Double line or nested rings (Three Rings, per the plate's Visual Grammar).
screen_reader_label: Nago sign: Relay. Meaning: pass this message, continue the chain.
no_color_only_note: Nested-ring shape carries the meaning, not color.
low_vision_support: Must communicate direction if used in wayfinding; requires a directional cue beyond the ring motif alone.
provenance_care_note: Canonical Nago sign, not part of the core-survival eight. Belongs to the Signal family.
alt_text: Three nested raised rings, the Nago sign for Relay.
open_questions: How direction is communicated when Relay is used for wayfinding is not yet specified.
